title: Associate Director Marketing
description:
**Associate Director- Marketing**

  

**About Urban Company**

Urban Company is a technology platform offering customers a variety of services at home. Customers use our platform to book services such as beauty treatments, haircuts, massage therapy, cleaning, plumbing, carpentry, appliance repair, painting etc., all delivered in the comfort of their home and at a time of their choosing. We promise our customers a high-quality, standardized and reliable service experience. To fulfill this promise, we work closely with our hand-picked service partners, enabling them with technology, training, products, tools, financing, insurance, and brand, helping them succeed and deliver on this promise.

  

Urban Company started out as UrbanClap in Nov 2014, when its founders, Abhiraj, Raghav and Varun realized that the home services industry was predominantly unorganized, fragmented and offline. Customers found it difficult to avail quality services in a convenient manner, and service professionals were struggling to make ends meet, having to rely upon several middlemen, contractors, and local aggregators. The founders felt that the industry was ripe for disruption, and launched Urban Company, with three key principles in mind -

*   Customer love: Build a platform that offers truly delightful and differentiated services
*   Partner empowerment: Build a deep, full-stack partnership with service partners, helping improve their earnings and overall livelihood
*   Technology first: Bring innovation and technology to an age-old industry.

  

**What will you do?**

As a leader for Cleaning & Pest Control, you will be the "CEO of Demand" for our largest and most complex business cluster, covering Bathroom & Kitchen Cleaning, Full Home Deep Cleaning, and Pest Control. Your mandate is to move the needle on top-line growth while building a brand that customers trust for their most intimate home needs.

  

**Key Responsibilities**

1\. **Consumer Insight & Empathy**: Go beyond the data. Spend time with customers and service partners to understand the "why" behind the "what." Identify the triggers and barriers for professional cleaning versus the unorganized sector.

  

2\. **Growth Charter & Problem Identification**: Take a first-principles approach to identify why a category isn't growing faster. Is it a frequency issue? A trust deficit? You will define the 6-12 month roadmap to unlock exponential growth.

  

3\. **Full-Stack Brand Marketing**: Lead the creative and media strategy for the cleaning cluster. Whether it’s a massive TVC or a hyper-targeted digital "InstaHelp" campaign, you will ensure the brand remains salient and "top of mind."

  

4\. **Pricing & Revenue Strategy**: Own the P&L levers. You will design pricing experiments, loyalty constructs, and promotional guardrails to optimize for both market share and unit economics.

  

**Who Should Apply?**

● You have experience in brand/content management, growth in start ups, or top-tier consulting.

● You get a kick out of building things and growing them, you aren’t afraid of ambiguity.

● You are comfortable with data analytics and data visualization but can also write a compelling creative brief that inspires an agency.

● First-Principles Thinker: You don't do things because "that's how it's done." You question every assumption until you find the most efficient path to growth.

● Cultural Fit: You thrive in high-intensity environments, value radical candor, and have a deep sense of ownership.

  

**What Can You Expect?**

● Unmatched Ownership: You are the primary driver of a multi-hundred crore business vertical.

● High-Growth Environment: A seat on a rocket ship that is scaling globally.

● Peer Excellence: Work alongside some of the sharpest minds from IIMs, ISB, and top global firms. ● Impact: The opportunity to build a brand that changes the lives of thousands of service professionals and millions of households.

**Why Join iSOCRATES & MADTECH.AI?**

*   Lead marketing at the intersection of a proven global services leader and a high-growth AI product platform
*   High-impact role shaping both corporate brand and next-gen SaaS GTM
*   Work directly with senior leadership in a highly visible position

Since 2015, iSOCRATES advises on, builds and manages mission-critical Marketing, Advertising and Data technologies, platforms, and processes as the Global Leader in MADTECH Resource Planning and Execution⁽ᵀᴹ⁾.

description:

**About Chefworks Hospitality LLP:** Chefworks Hospitality LLP is a hospitality-focused organization operating in the F&B ecosystem, delivering branded dining experiences with a strong emphasis on service quality, customer satisfaction, and growth. We are a premium catering in Bangalore with buffet setups, live counters & chef-curated menus for weddings, corporate events & private parties. Exceptional taste, hygiene & presentation every time. We are hiring a **Director – Marketing** **and Business Development** to lead end-to-end marketing strategy and drive revenue impact across our F&B offerings.

  

**Role Summary**

The **Director – Marketing** **and Business Development** will own the overall marketing function for the company’s F&B and hospitality brands in Bangalore. This role is responsible for building brand awareness, driving customer acquisition and repeat visits, improving conversion across digital touchpoints, and ensuring marketing activities directly support business growth.

  

**Key Responsibilities**

  

**Marketing Strategy & Planning**

*   Set clear KPIs, budgets, timelines, and measurable outcomes for campaigns.

*     
    

**Brand & Positioning**

**Customer Acquisition & Revenue Growth**

title: Director, GTM Marketing Analytics
description:
The Director of Go To Market (GTM) Analytics is a strategic, high-visibility leader responsible for driving data-informed decision-making across Amex GBT’s global growth engine. This role oversees insights, performance analytics, forecasting, and optimization across Marketing, Sales, and Client Management motions. You will partner closely with leaders in Commercial, Marketing, Revenue Management, Product, Decision Analytics, and Finance to build an integrated view of GTM effectiveness and accelerate revenue growth.

  

This role requires a blend of commercial acuity, marketing science expertise, and deep analytical leadership. It is ideal for someone who can zoom out to set strategy and zoom in to challenge assumptions, interrogate data, and operationalize insights.

  

**What You'll Do**

**1\. GTM Performance Management & Insights**

*   Own the end-to-end measurement framework for Amex GBT’s GTM engine, spanning demand generation, pipeline progression, sales productivity, client adoption, and retention
*   Partner with Marketing, Sales, and Client Management teams to assess program impact and optimize channel mix, targeting, segmentation, and investment decisions
*   Lead monthly and quarterly business reviews with actionable insights, trend analysis, and executive-ready narratives

  

**2\. Forecasting, Planning & Target Setting**

*   Build and continuously refine revenue-adjacent forecasting models aligned to marketing contribution, sales motions, and customer expansion
*   Partner with Finance and Revenue Management on budget planning, scenario modeling, and goal setting
*   Identify GTM-specific drivers of performance variance and provide recommendations to close gaps

  

**3\. Analytics Strategy & Roadmap**

*   Develop a cohesive analytics roadmap covering attribution, experimentation, segmentation, predictive scoring, funnel intelligence, and customer value modeling
*   Define data requirements and partner with Data Engineering and Decision Analytics to improve data accessibility, quality, and structure
*   Champion a culture of measurable impact, experimentation, and evidence-based decision-making

  

**4\. Audience Strategy, Targeting & Market Insights**

*   Define and continuously refine audience strategy, including addressable opportunity sizing, ICP development, and high-value segment identification.
*   Partner with stakeholders across Marketing, Commercial and Decision Analytics to translate segmentation and behavioral insights into actionable targeting strategies across the full bowtie funnel.
*   Identify growth opportunities by analyzing engagement patterns, buying committees, account behaviors, and customer lifecycle signals to inform channel allocation, campaign design and sales motions.
*   Build an integrated view of prospect intent and customer value indicators to ensure consistent, data-drive activation, personalization, and prioritization across GTM teams.

  

**5\. Cross-Functional Leadership & Collaboration**

*   Serve as the analytical “center of gravity” for GTM decisions across Commercial
*   Translate complex analytics into clear guidance for executives and ops teams
*   Partner with MarTech, Digital, and Data Science to operationalize analytical outputs into automated workflows (e.g., scoring models, dashboards, triggers)

  

**6\. Team Leadership & Development**

*   Lead and grow a team of analysts and data stewards across performance analytics, forecasting, and insights
*   Set analytical standards, including methodologies, governance, and storytelling best practices
*   Foster a high-performance, collaborative, and inclusive team culture

  

**What We're Looking For**

*   15+ years in analytics roles spanning Marketing, Sales Ops, Revenue Operations, or Business Intelligence
*   Strong understanding of GTM concepts: attribution, funnel performance, ROI modeling, segmentation, lifecycle analytics, pipeline and forecasting
*   Experience in travel, SaaS, or subscription-based business models highly preferred
*   People leadership within a global environment required
*   Proven ability to translate analytics into executive-level strategic recommendations
*   Experience leading analytics functions in a complex global B2B environment
*   High comfort working with large datasets, BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker), and CRM/Marketing Ops systems (Salesforce, Marketo, HubSpot or similar)
*   Exceptional communication, storytelling, and stakeholder management skills
*   Familiarity with predictive modeling, machine learning concepts, and experimentation design
*   Background in consulting or a senior analytics role supporting C-suite stakeholders

title: Director - Digital
description:
****About WPP Media  
  
****WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth.   
  
WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.

WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.  
  
We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. title: Director of Digital Marketing
description:
The Director/ Manager of Digital Marketing will be responsible in assisting the Commercial Director with all Marketing Planning & Execution strategies for the hotel.  
  
**What will I be doing?  
  
**RESPONSIBILTIES MARKETING:  
  

*   To manage and direct all paid advertising, delivering a cost effective and appropriate annual advertising strategy within the agreed budget.
*   To manage all on-line activities for Hilton Mumbai International Airport (HMIA) on Brand.com and Third party websites, ensuring all special promotions are loaded and available with the appropriate lead-in times and that all information is kept up to date.
*   Develop an annual Marketing Plan in conjunction with the Sales/Revenue depts., ensuring that the Plan reflects the strategy needed to achieve targeted results in all revenue streams.
*   Specify market requirements for current and future gap periods/low demand times by conducting marketing research to support the marketing strategies.
*   Ensure that all planned strategies are measurable and are evaluated to gauge their success, with appropriate lead-in times and deadlines.
*   To analyses potential partner relationships for HMIA that will benefit both parties and reach the joint target markets.
*   To manage all aspects of print production, receipt and distribution with effective use of flyers, e-marketing, text campaigns and all other forms of communication.
*   To proof-read and vet all written materials for external customer use, ensuring a high quality is achieved.
*   To ensure strict compliance to Hilton Hotels brand standards in all artwork/graphic design/logos etc.
*   Oversee the consistency of all hotel communication tools in terms of design, copy, color and adherence to Hilton Hotels brand standards.
*   Utilize information on HMIA key source markets and determine appropriate marketing campaigns to increase business from these key markets.
*   Manage relations with relevant local media and ensure a good working relationship is achieved and on-going.
*   Provide direction and follow-up to the PR/Marketing coordinator and other team members relating to marketing.
*   Attend Marketing briefings with updates on campaigns
*   Ensure there is a good working relationship between PR/Events/Graphic team working together with coherent strategies that benefit the hotel.
*   Attend F&B meeting and Revenue meeting to understand the key markets and needs that marketing and advertising can address to improve results. Provide a Campaign Plan detailing activities to be undertaken to ensure results are achieved.
*   Ensure that a monthly report is submitted with copies of all advertising placed in external publications.
*   Submit monthly report summarizing activities carried out previous month and results gained: Month End MIS, Owner’s PPT, Social Media Performance, PMP Report, any other report that may be asked.
*   Work alongside the PR and Events team to ensure that all HMIA events are marketed to ensure maximum publicity and revenue, staying within budget constraints.  
      
      
    

COMMITS TO FINANCIAL RESULTS:  
  
To display a commercial awareness of the market place in which an individual works. An ability to continuously priorities one’s actions so as to deliver the best sales and profit outcomes for the business. Ability to achieve set goals and financial targets. A concern for working toward a common result and committing to excel in attaining all key business objectives.  
  
PLANNING:  
  
Ability to priorities and manage own personal time efficiently within tight schedules. Looks ahead and makes forecasts concerning market trends to set demanding but realistic targets.  
  
INITIATIVE:  
  
The ability to do more than is required or expected in the job to improve results, find new opportunities, exceed in achievement of business objectives and avoid problems through proactively anticipating them.  
  
INTERPERSONAL UNDERSTANDING:  
  
Able to read and interpret both verbal and non-verbal feelings and concerns of others.  
  
RELATIONSHIP BUILDING:  
  
Ability to network, build and maintain friendly contacts with people who can impact on business positively and help achieve work related goals.  
  
CUSTOMER SERVICE ORIENTATION:  
  
Ability to deliver high levels of customer service by focusing on the needs of client and exceeding their expectations.  
  
NEGOTIATION SKILLS:  
  

*   Ability to persuade, convince and influence others.
*   To have patience and take setbacks positively. Able to present information logically and confidently verbally and in written form.  
      
      
    

SELF CONFIDENCE:  
  
A belief in one’s ability to accomplish a task. Confidence in ones decisions or opinions and able to manage the many outcomes as a result of failure to gain a sale.  
  
**What are we looking for?  
  
**Innovative, action oriented individual able to identify and implement results oriented marketing strategies for the hotel.  
  
**What will it be like to work for Hilton?  
  
**Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. title: Director of SEO (US Market)
description:
Senior SEO Delivery Leader (Enterprise | US Market)

  

**Location / Time Zone:** Eastern Time (US) – 5 PM to 2 AM IST

**Experience:** 10–14+ years

  

Pepper is building a **new category of content and SEO growth platform**—where **strategy, content, technology, automation, and AI** come together to drive measurable business outcomes.

  

Over the last five years, Pepper has built:

*   A network of **150,000+ content creators**, working with the **top 5% talent**
*   A customer base of **2,500+ global brands**, including large enterprises and fast-scaling B2B companies
*   A **SaaS-enabled content marketing platform** that powers content creation, workflow orchestration, and distribution at scale

  

Now, we’re extending this foundation to build a **modern enterprise SEO growth engine**—one that goes far beyond keywords and blog production. This role sits at the heart of that evolution.

  

The Opportunity

  

We are looking for a **Senior SEO Delivery Leader** to lead enterprise SEO programs for **US-based customers**, while helping Pepper build a **fundamentally different SEO model**:

  

*   Less manual execution, more **systems and automation**
*   Less “SEO as a service,” more **SEO as a growth engine**
*   Less reactive delivery, more **predictable, scalable outcomes**

  

You’ll work with **large enterprise portfolios**, shape **how SEO is delivered at scale**, and partner closely with **product, data, and AI teams** to operationalize SEO through technology.

This is a leadership role for someone who understands **how SEO really drives revenue**—and wants to build the future of it.

  

What You’ll Do at Pepper

  

1\. Own Enterprise SEO Delivery (US Market)

*   Lead **end-to-end SEO delivery** for large, complex enterprise clients (multiple brands, domains, and markets).
*   Act as the **senior-most SEO owner** for your portfolio—responsible for outcomes, not just execution.
*   Ensure delivery quality that meets **US enterprise expectations** across strategy, communication, reporting, and impact.

  

2\. Build a Tech-Led SEO Growth Engine

*   Partner with Pepper’s **product, automation, and AI teams** to:
*   Productize SEO workflows
*   Reduce manual execution through automation
*   Scale content + SEO decisions using data and intelligence
*   Help define how **AI-assisted content, SEO insights, and workflow orchestration** are embedded into delivery.
*   Turn SEO from a service into a **repeatable, scalable system**.

  

3\. Strategic SEO Leadership

*   Design **enterprise-grade SEO strategies** tied directly to business KPIs: pipeline, revenue, demand capture, and brand authority.
*   Oversee:
*   Technical SEO at scale (indexation, architecture, Core Web Vitals, migrations)
*   Content-led SEO programs across categories and funnels
*   Programmatic and long-tail SEO strategies where relevant
*   Push beyond traffic metrics into **commercial and revenue impact**.

  

4\. Client & Stakeholder Management

*   Be the **trusted SEO advisor** for senior client stakeholders (CMOs, VPs of Marketing, Heads of Growth).
*   Lead QBRs, annual planning, and long-term SEO roadmaps.
*   Translate complex SEO concepts into **clear business narratives**.

  

5\. Team & Delivery Excellence

*   Lead and mentor **senior SEO managers, strategists, and specialists**.
*   Build delivery frameworks, QA standards, and playbooks to ensure consistency across enterprise accounts.
*   Balance **onshore/offshore collaboration** while maintaining premium delivery standards.

  

What We’re Looking For

  

Must-Haves

  

*   **10–14+ years** of SEO experience, with significant exposure to **enterprise and B2B SEO**
*   **5+ years** in a client-facing leadership role at a B2B agency, SaaS company, or enterprise in-house team
*   Proven experience managing **large SEO portfolios** with multiple stakeholders
*   Strong understanding of:
*   Technical SEO at enterprise scale
*   Content-led and programmatic SEO
*   SEO measurement tied to business outcomes
*   Hands-on familiarity with tools like:
*   GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs
*   Screaming Frog, Clearscope (or similar)
*   Workflow, reporting, and automation tools

  

What Will Set You Apart

  

*   Experience working with or building **SEO platforms, automation, or AI-assisted workflows**
*   Comfort operating in **ambiguity and zero-to-one environments**
*   Strong POV on **where SEO is heading**—and what needs to change
*   Ability to think like a **product leader**, not just a service owner

  

How We Work

  

*   This role operates in the **US Eastern Time Zone**

  

We value:

  

*   Ownership over hierarchy
*   Outcomes over activity
*   Clear thinking over SEO jargon
*   We encourage **thought leadership**, experimentation, and shaping the future of SEO—not just executing playbooks

  

Benefits at Pepper

  

*   Paid menstrual leave
*   Comprehensive medical insurance
*   COVID-19 insurance coverage

  

**If you’re excited about building a new kind of SEO engine—powered by content, tech, automation, and AI—this is your seat at the table.**

title: Business Head
description:
**About upGrad:**

upGrad is one of India’s leading higher edtech platforms, serving **millions of learners across 100+ countries** with strong university and industry partnerships. With a mission to enable career success through outcome-driven learning, upGrad is now building its next growth engine focused on undergraduate learners across India.

  

**Role Overview:**

upGrad is looking to hire a high-impact Business Leader to spearhead a strategic initiative focused on building and scaling a large consumer internet business within the higher education admissions and discovery ecosystem.

  

This role will own the vision, growth, monetization, and overall business strategy for a platform focused on helping learners discover and enroll into online and hybrid higher education programs, leveraging upGrad’s strong university partnerships and extensive program portfolio.

  

This is a business-building role with significant ownership and is ideal for someone who thrives in high-growth environments and wants the opportunity to build a category-defining business from the ground up.

  

**Key Responsibilities**

*   Drive end-to-end business ownership including growth, revenue, funnel metrics, and monetization.
*   Build and scale a consumer internet-led business with a strong focus on acquisition, engagement, and conversion.
*   Develop and optimize growth funnels across lead generation, user journeys, and conversion touchpoints.
*   Identify scalable growth levers across performance marketing, partnerships, SEO, organic growth, and product-led initiatives.
*   Work cross-functionally with Product, Growth, Sales, Partnerships, Marketing, and Operations teams to drive business outcomes.
*   Define GTM strategy, operating cadence, and business expansion plans.
*   Use analytics and consumer insights to improve funnel efficiency, user experience, and revenue performance.
*   Build scalable systems, processes, and teams to support long-term growth.

  

**What We’re Looking For**

*   8–15 years of experience in consumer internet, marketplace, growth, or digital business roles
*   Strong business acumen with an ownership-first mindset
*   Proven track record of building or scaling a business vertical, category, or growth engine
*   Deep understanding of acquisition funnels, conversion optimization, monetization, and lead-generation businesses
*   Strong analytical thinking combined with execution excellence
*   Experience owning key growth and revenue metrics at scale
*   Ability to operate effectively in fast-paced, cross-functional environments

  

**Ideal Candidate Profile**

The ideal candidate is likely someone currently working at a Director / AVP / GM level, who is one step below CXO leadership and is looking for an opportunity to take larger ownership and build a business from scratch.

We are specifically looking for candidates with strong consumer internet and growth business experience. This is not a traditional admissions, sales, or brand marketing role.

  

**Why This Role?**

*   Opportunity to build and scale a high-impact business within one of India’s leading edtech organizations
*   High visibility and direct influence on strategic growth initiatives
*   End-to-end ownership across growth, monetization, product, and business operations
*   Chance to create a category-defining platform in the higher education ecosystem

description:

****Job Number**26060666

OR

**

*   Maintains budget control.

**

*   Ensures hotel information is updated regularly on the internet/intranet.

title: Associate Director - Brand
description:
The Story TV brand, end to end. This means the strategy behind it, the work that expresses it, the partners who amplify it, and the numbers that prove it's working.  
  
**Specifically  
  
**The candidate will have responsibilities across the following functions**:  
  
**

*   Brand strategy and positioning. The argument for who StoryTV is, who it is not, and what it stands for. Tagline, visual identity, and brand architecture as we scale beyond a single app.
*   Campaigns, both digital and physical. Always-on brand work, tentpole moments around show launches, and the spectacle-driven activations we increasingly lean into (Pink Auto fleets, truck convoys, cultural takeovers).
*   IP and show marketing. Launching our biggest titles the way a studio launches films. Turning shows into cultural moments, not just content drops.
*   Talent and creator partnerships. Building the roster, celebrity signings, creator tie-ups, and ambassador programmes.
*   PR, communications, and editorial. Earned media, spokesperson narratives, crisis response, and founder and leadership voice.
*   Agency ecosystem. Creative, PR, experiential, and production. You are the person they call, the person who briefs them, and the person who holds them to craft.
*   Brand team and budget. Hiring, structuring, and running the brand org and its spend.  
      
    

**KRAs  
  
**

*   Define and codify the Story TV brand platform (positioning, tagline, identity system, tone) and get it adopted across product, marketing, and content.
*   Deliver an annual brand calendar of campaigns and activations, with clear tentpoles tied to show launches, category moments, and cultural events.
*   Build a talent and partnerships roster that extends the Chahal playbook across sports, film, and digital creators.
*   Run the PR and comms function, so StoryTV is the default name journalists reach for when they write about microdrama in India.
*   Operationalise brand measurement through brand health studies, share of voice tracking, and a clear read on how brand investment moves business metrics.
*   Manage the brand P& L with discipline, and make the case internally for what brand spend is buying.  
      
    

**KPIs  
  
**

*   Brand health, tracked quarterly via a dip study: unaided awareness, aided awareness, consideration, and preference vs. the competitive set in our priority markets.
*   Share of voice in the microdrama and short-form entertainment category across earned media, social conversation, and paid.
*   Organic and branded search volume for StoryTV and our top IPs.
*   Direct and organic install share as a percentage of total installs is the cleanest proxy for brand pull vs. paid pull.
*   Show launch performance: first-week viewership, social traction, and earned media for every tentpole title.
*   Talent and partnership impact: reach, engagement, and attributable installs from each signing.
*   PR output: tier-1 coverage volume, sentiment, and share of quotes in category stories.
*   Campaign efficiency: cost per reach and cost per engaged user for brand campaigns, benchmarked against category norms.
*   Brand budget discipline: spend vs. plan and brand-driven contribution to blended CAC over time.

title: Associate Director - Direct Marketing
description:
Optum is a global organization that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on the communities we serve as you help us advance health optimization on a global scale. Join us to start **Caring. Connecting. Growing together.**The Channel Lead - Direct Marketing is a senior offshore leadership role responsible for owning 1:1 direct marketing content strategy across email, SMS, and direct mail for B2B, B2C, and Provider audiences. This role serves as the enterprise owner for direct marketing channels, ensuring scalable, compliant, and personalized communications that drive measurable business outcomes. The role operates as a channel center of excellence, balancing speed, personalization, and regulatory rigor within a global, matrixed environment.  
  
**Primary Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Channel Strategy & Ownership

*   Own the 1:1 direct marketing content strategy across email, SMS, and direct mail for B2B, B2C, and Provider audiences
*   Align direct channel strategies to enterprise brand positioning, product narratives, and campaign objectives
*   Serve as the global subject-matter expert for direct marketing content and channel best practices

*   Content Planning, Governance & Operations

*   Lead planning, creative briefing, and content development in partnership with creative and campaign teams
*   Build and govern the direct marketing content operating model, including calendars, workflows, QA, approvals, and version control
*   Establish and maintain channel-specific content standards, templates, and reusable assets

*   Personalization, AI & Automation Enablement

*   Advance efficiency and personalization through AI-assisted copy development, dynamic content, and modular templates
*   Define responsible AI guardrails ensuring human review, compliance, and medical accuracy
*   Partner with MarTech and Data teams to ensure content structures support targeting and personalization logic

*   Cross-Functional Partnership

*   Partner closely with Campaign, MarTech, Data & Analytics, Product, Technology, Compliance, and Legal teams
*   Ensure segmentation, targeting, journey design, and measurement frameworks are fit-for-purpose
*   Act as a trusted advisor on direct marketing content implications across initiatives

*   Testing, Measurement & Optimization

*   Establish and own testing frameworks including MVPs, A/B testing, and multivariate testing within regulatory guardrails
*   Define and maintain a test-and-learn roadmap, codifying insights into reusable playbooks
*   Own performance reporting across deliverability, engagement, conversion, list health, and opt-out metrics

*   Compliance & Risk Stewardship

*   Ensure full compliance with HIPAA, TCPA, CAN-SPAM, ADA accessibility standards, and enterprise policies
*   Steward approval processes, documentation, and audit trails for all direct marketing communications
*   Proactively identify and mitigate content-related compliance and reputational risks

*   Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or re-assignment to different work locations, change in teams and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to the changing business environment). The Company may adopt, vary or rescind these policies and directives in its absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or otherwise) on its ability to do so  
    

**Required Qualifications  
  
**

*   Bachelor's degree (Advanced degree preferred)
*   13+ years of overall experience with 8+ years of experience in direct marketing, CRM, or relationship marketing at enterprise scale
*   Hands-on experience with MarTech stacks including ESPs, journey orchestration, CDPs, A/B testing, and dynamic content
*   Experience leveraging AI in content operations with clear guardrails and human-in-the-loop review
*   Solid understanding of healthcare and regulated marketing environments, including consent and PHI handling
*   Demonstrated success driving personalization, content governance, and measurable business outcomes
*   Proven excellent stakeholder management skills with experience influencing senior, US-based leaders  
      
    

_At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live healthier lives and make the health system work better for everyone. We believe everyone-of every race, gender, sexuality, age, location and income-deserves the opportunity to live their healthiest life. Today, however, there are still far too many barriers to good health which are disproportionately experienced by people of color, historically marginalized groups and those with lower incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes - an enterprise priority reflected in our mission._

title: Director of Organic Growth
description:
****About Us  
****QuillBot was founded in 2017 with a mission to help students and professionals strengthen their writing. Today, we help over 56 million people around the world create great things. Whether you're writing, designing, coding, or collaborating, QuillBot is a place where anyone can create at the speed of thought. Our AI-powered tools help you think clearly, communicate effectively, and create beautifully—across every platform, in any format, at any skill level. If you're passionate about using technology to make the path from inspiration to execution more accessible, intentional, and relevant, come join us.

**Role Overview  
**We are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.

**Responsibilities**

*   **Strategy & Leadership**
    *   **Organic Growth Strategy**: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. 
    *   **Team Leadership**: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.
    *   **Roadmap Ownership**: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.
    *   **Cross-Functional Partnership**: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.
    *   **Product Roadmap Influence**: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.
*   **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)  
    **
    *   **SEO Program Ownership**: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.
    *   **Technical SEO**: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.
    *   **Content & Keyword Strategy**: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.
    *   **Link Building & Authority**: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.
    *   **Algorithm Resilience**: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.
*   **Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)**
    *   **GEO Strategy**: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).
    *   **Content for LLMs**: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.
    *   **Measurement & Experimentation**: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.
    *   **Competitive Intelligence**: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.
*   **App Store Optimisation (ASO)**
    *   **ASO Program Ownership**: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
    *   **Listing Optimization:** Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.
    *   **Ratings & Reviews**: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.
    *   **A/B Testing**: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.
    *   **Market-Specific ASO**: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.
*   **Extension Store Optimisation**
    *   **Extension Visibility**: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.
    *   **Listing & CRO**: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.
    *   **Ratings & Review Strategy**: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.
    *   **Cross-Channel Synergy**: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.
*   **Analytics, Reporting & Insights**
    *   **Performance Measurement**: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.
    *   **Executive Reporting**: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.
    *   **Tool Stack**: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).

**Qualifications**

*   8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.
*   Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.
*   Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.
*   Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywords
*   Proven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.
*   Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.
*   Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.
*   Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.
*   Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).
*   Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.
*   Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.
*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

**Bonus Points**

*   Experience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.
*   Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.
*   Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.
*   Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.
*   Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.
*   Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.
*   Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.

**Why Join QuillBot?**

*   **Ownership & Impact**: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.
*   **Scope & Challenge**: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.
*   **Collaborative Culture**: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.
*   **Remote Flexibility**: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.
*   **Professional Growth**: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.

**Benefits & Perks**

*   Competitive salary and annual bonus
*   Medical coverage
*   Life and accidental insurance
*   Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
*   Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
*   Maternity & parental leave
*   Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
*   On-site & remote company events throughout the year
*   Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
*   Employee referral program
*   Premium access to QuillBot

\*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. 

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!  
  
This role is eligible for hire in India.  
  
We are a virtual-first company with employees across the United States, Canada, India, Germany, and the Netherlands. Our compensation approach is market-based and varies by location while ensuring fairness, consistency, and transparency.

The base pay for this role is determined by several factors, including:

*   Relevant professional experience
*   Skills and expertise
*   Scope and responsibilities of the role
*   Internal equity considerations 

In addition to base salary, total compensation may include bonus, equity, and benefits. Eligibility depends on role, level, and location.

We are committed to equal pay for equal work, and all compensation decisions are made using consistent, gender-neutral criteria in alignment with pay transparency requirements  
  
#QuillBot  
  

**Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)  
**We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

title: Associate Director - Social
description:
****About WPP Media  
  
****WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth.   
  
WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.  
  
For more information, visit wppmedia.com.  
  
****About WPP Media  
  
****WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.  
  
WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com  
  
At WPP Media, We Believe In The Power Of Our Culture And Our People. It’s What Elevates Us To Deliver Exceptional Experiences For Both Our Clients And Each Other. In This Role It Will Be Critical To Embrace WPP & WPP Media’s Shared Core Values:  
  

*   Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.
*   Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.
*   Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.  
      
    

****Role Summary And Impact  
  
****As part of the Global Operations Centre (GOC), you will work closely with teams across the United States, Europe, and Asia to deliver high-impact solutions in a collaborative, multicultural environment. We are looking for a Associate Director Social who will:  
  

*   Develop strong relationships with counterparts in GroupM-Hub regional teams (Europe, U.S., Asia, MEA, AUNZ)
*   Lead the training and growth of your local social team.
*   Enforce Social best practices with a focus on platform expertise, consistency, and quality of work delivery.
*   Be accountable for consistent work delivery to GroupM-Hub regional teams by ensuring a high quality of output.
*   Serve as point of escalation for your channel and take ownership of resolving challenges.
*   Provide career development and coaching for your social team.
*   Line manages 2-5 direct reports with as many as 50-70 indirect reports.
*   Provide timely and actionable feedback to the team to aid in their development, improvement, and progress. Provide awareness and recognition for jobs well done.
*   Provide support to the People Planning team in capacity planning & resource management for the team.
*   Actively involved in conducting interviews to meet hiring requirements and sourcing the right talent pool for your team.  
      
    

****Skills And Experience  
  
****If this opportunity looks right for you, we are looking for candidates who have:  
  

*   Graduation or Post Graduation Degree in Any stream
*   8+ year's professional experience in digital media execution
*   You are an expert & executed on Meta as well as on Snapchat, Pinterest, LinkedIn
*   May have an idea on Reddit, Tiktok, X
*   You are proficient in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheet
*   Working knowledge in HubSpot, Smartly, 4C, Scibids, or third-party tools like Dataroma, Google Studio is an added advantage
*   Experience managing multi-location media activation teams.
*   Experience training and maintaining quality standards at scale.
*   Experience providing service to local teams from a centralized location.
*   Passion for everything digital, with an active interest and understanding of online advertising industry trends.
*   Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written
*   Possess a solution-oriented mindset and analytical skillset.
*   Proactive, display exemplary leadership with a positive go-getter attitude.  
      
    

****Life At WPP Media & Benefits  
  
****Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media & WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.    
  
WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.  
  
We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.  
  
Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

description:
**About Agoda  
  
**At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.  
  
Today, we are part of Booking Holdings \[NASDAQ: BKNG\], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.  
  
No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.  
  
**Associate director - Flights Marketing  
  
****Get to Know our Team:**    
  
The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.  
  
**In this role, you’ll get to:** 

*   Co-own the flights PnL with Product counterparts
*   Define the overall Marketing Strategy for Flights Vertical
*   Execute the strategy: spearhead the development, execution, and optimization for growing Agoda’s Flights business on different channels (e.g., CRM, Paid Peformance marketing, pricing)
*   Guide, coach and manage a team
*   Conduct end-to-end analysis of large, complex datasets related to channel performance, user behavior, and market trends, translating raw data into actionable insights
*   Develop hypotheses, design experiments (e.g., A/B tests), and build structured analyses to rigorously evaluate campaign effectiveness and drive data-driven decisions for channel growth
*   Partner closely with various business functions, especially Marketing Accommodation, Flights product and flights supply, to identify opportunities, analyze, and interpret trends or patterns in complex data sets using different techniques and tools such as SQL or Tableau to drive meaningful initiatives
*   Monitor and report on the effectiveness of business initiatives, providing insights and recommendations for continuous improvement.
*   Communicate complex findings, performance updates, and strategic recommendations clearly and concisely to key stakeholders, including senior management
*   Lead, mentor, and develop a team of analysts and managers; participate in hiring and onboarding new team members.  
      
    

**What you’ll need to succeed:** 

*   Extensive Experience: 10+ years in marketing analytics position or otherwise in projects involving big data - preferably in the tech, e-commerce, or digital marketing industry. Experience in articulating strategic issues and negotiating with C-level executives – experience in leading strategy consulting projects
*   Bachelor's degree in computer science/Statistics/Math or Engineering or Economics and Finance
*   Data-Driven Approach:  Strong analytical skills with the ability to analyze data, translate data into actionable insights, and generate impactful recommendations using SQL. You really need to love data for this role!
*   Strong Communication Skills:  Exceptional writing and verbal communication abilities, with proficiency in creating impactful and visually appealing presentations.
*   Stakeholder management: Ability to effectively communicate, influence and persuade with different levels of stakeholders (especially Senior Management) with proven strong commercial acumen
*   People management experience: including hiring, coaching, and developing team members
*   Entrepreneurial mindset: A proactive, entrepreneurial mindset with a strong sense of ownership and a get-thing-done attitude.  
      
    

**It’s great if you have:** 

*   Experience in digital or social media marketing
*   Experience in the online travel or e-commerce industry
*   Experience in flights industry
*   Experience in hypothesis testing frameworks, statistical analysis, and using Python/R for data manipulation and analysis.

title: Director - Marketing (US Market - Night Shift)
description:
**Location:** Work from Office, Mohali (Punjab) India  
  
**Employment Type:** Full time  
  
**Shift Timing:** 7:30 PM IST to 4:30 AM IST  
  
**Role Overview  
  
**We're looking for a Marketing Manager who thrives in execution, coordination, and making things actually happen. This role acts as Head of Marketing and acts as the central engine that translates strategy into high-quality, on-time delivery across teams.  
  
**Key Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Execution Ownership
*   Own end-to-end execution of marketing campaigns across channels
*   Translate strategic plans into actionable briefs, timelines, and deliverables
*   Ensure zero drop-offs between ideation and go-live
*   Team Coordination
*   Act as the single point of contact between design, content, performance, product, and external agencies
*   Align cross-functional teams to deliver against campaign goals
*   Run structured sprint planning and consistent follow-ups
*   Project & Timeline Management
*   Build and manage detailed project plans with clear milestones
*   Track progress, flag risks early, and eliminate bottlenecks
*   Ensure campaigns are delivered on time and at expected quality standards without exceptions
*   Lead Management & Funnel Coordination
*   Own the lead flow lifecycle from vendor handoff to inside sales conversion
*   Act as the bridge between Vendor Manager and Inside Sales to ensure zero lead leakage
*   Ensure proper lead allocation, tracking, and hygiene within CRM systems
*   Identify funnel drop-offs and proactively resolve them with relevant teams
*   Create structured weekly reports on lead performance and optimization areas
*   Quality Control
*   Maintain brand consistency across all assets and channels
*   Review deliverables before final approvals
*   Ensure all outputs align with strategy and defined standards
*   Data & Reporting
*   Track campaign and lead performance in collaboration with performance marketing and sales teams
*   Share execution-level insights and learnings with the Head of Marketing
*   Maintain dashboards for campaign tracking and funnel visibility
*   Process Implementation
*   Work closely with the Head of Marketing to implement systems, workflows, and SOPs
*   Build scalable processes for both campaign execution and lead management
*   Continuously improve operational efficiency across teams  
      
    

**What We're Looking For & Required Qualification  
  
**

*   7+ years of experience in marketing execution, campaign management, or lead lifecycle management
*   Strong understanding of digital marketing, sales funnels, and CRM systems
*   Experience working with inside sales teams and external vendors/agencies
*   Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to manage stakeholders, drive clarity, and ensure alignment across teams
*   Strong ownership mindset with the ability to handle multiple priorities without compromising on deadlines
*   Highly detail-oriented with a structured approach to problem-solving and execution
*   Ability to operate in fast-paced environments with consistency and reliability  
      
    

**What Success Looks Like  
  
**

*   Campaigns are executed seamlessly and delivered on schedule without delays
*   Leads are managed efficiently with clear visibility and minimal leakage
*   Cross-functional teams operate with alignment and clarity
*   Deadlines are consistently met without follow-ups or escalations

title: Account Director - Performance Marketing
companyName: Talent Corner HR Services Pvt Ltd
description:
We are now looking for a **Account Director** who can oversee multiple Account Managers, ensure operational excellence, improve client retention, and help scale delivery systems within the agency.

  

**Role Overview:**

The Group Account Manager will be responsible for managing a portfolio of client accounts indirectly through Account Managers and Junior Executives.

This role focuses on:

*   delivery quality,
*   client retention,
*   team management,
*   escalation handling,
*   reporting standards,
*   operational efficiency,
*   and process building.

You will act as the bridge between leadership and execution teams.

  

**Key Responsibilities**

Team & Account Oversight

*   Manage and oversee 5 Performance Marketing Managers and their respective teams, each Account Manager manages 5-6 Clients.
*   Ensure smooth execution across multiple ecommerce and D2C accounts
*   Monitor campaign performance and account health regularly
*   Review reporting quality, communication standards, and timelines

  

**Client Management**

*   Handle client escalations and critical discussions
*   Participate in strategy and review calls with key clients
*   Ensure strong client satisfaction and retention
*   Identify upsell and growth opportunities within existing accounts

  

**Operational Excellence**

*   Build and improve SOPs, workflows, and reporting systems
*   Standardize account management processes across teams
*   Ensure task accountability and delivery consistency
*   Improve internal coordination between performance, creative, and account teams

  

**Team Development**

*   Mentor and guide Performance Marketing Managers
*   Train team members on communication, reporting, and operational processes
*   Identify performance gaps and help improve team productivity

  

**Performance & Growth**

*   Ensure accounts achieve performance benchmarks
*   Work closely with Performance Marketing Executive teams to improve results
*   Help leadership improve operational scalability and reduce delivery bottlenecks

  

**Requirements**

Must Have

*   5–6 years of experience in performance marketing agencies
*   Experience handling multiple D2C/ecommerce clients
*   Strong understanding of Meta Ads and Google Ads ecosystem
*   Prior experience managing performance marketing team
*   Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
*   Strong process orientation and operational mindset

  

**Good to Have**

*   Experience working with high-spend d2c ecomm brands
*   Understanding of creative strategy and retention marketing
*   Experience building SOPs and scalable delivery systems
*   Ability to manage fast-paced agency environments

  

**Key Skills**

*   Client Servicing
*   Team Management
*   Ecommerce Marketing
*   Meta Ads
*   Google Ads
*   Operational Management
*   Performance Marketing
*   Escalation Handling
*   Reporting & Analytics
*   SOP Building

  

**KPIs / Success Metrics**

*   Client retention rate
*   Account growth & upsell contribution
*   Delivery quality consistency
*   Team productivity & accountability
*   Client satisfaction scores

title: Director - Marketing & Student Recruitment
description:
**Position Description**

**Position Title:** Director of Marketing & Student Recruitment

**Reports To:** Chief Operating Officer

**Employment Type:** Full-time

**Location:** UNSW Bengaluru Campus

  

**Position Summary:**

The Director of Marketing & Student Recruitment leads the UNSW Bengaluru marketing and student recruitment strategy and operations, operating within UNSW’s global brand and governance framework. The role is accountable for enforcing brand quality standards, delivering local market growth, managing end-to-end student recruitment performance, and ensuring all activity in-market is coordinated with UNSW Sydney to present a unified brand and student experience.

  

This role blends strategic marketing leadership with hands-on student recruitment channel management, brand stewardship, and stakeholder engagement to attract high-quality students and meet undergraduate and postgraduate enrolment targets. The leader owns the full recruitment lifecycle — from integrated campaign development and partner management to outreach programs and pipeline conversion — while ensuring alignment with UNSW’s institutional brand, strategic priorities, and compliance frameworks.

  

Accountable for leading strategies that deliver enrolment growth and financial outcomes, while navigating brand governance, risk management, and regulatory compliance within India’s higher education context, the role leads the campus-wide marketing and student recruitment function to support enrolment objectives, brand reputation, and stakeholder trust. The position partners closely with UNSW Sydney and collaborates with local academic and professional leaders to deliver market impact across priority regions and segments.

  

**Accountabilities**

Strategy, Planning & Governance

*   Own the multi-year UNSW Bengaluru marketing and student recruitment strategy and annual operating plan, delivering UNSW Bengaluru outcomes and aligned to UNSW’s Marketing & Digital Experience (M&DX) strategy, global priorities, with appropriate localization to account for the local market context.
*   Lead integrated campaign planning across paid, owned, shared and earned channels with undergraduate and postgraduate marketing and recruitment funnels mapped to awareness, consideration, application, offer, and enrolment stages.
*   Analyse market trends, competitor activity, and student data to inform evidence-based strategies, forecasting, and pipeline targets.
*   Maintain collaborative planning rhythms with UNSW Sydney M&DX and Student Recruitment teams to ensure cross-campus alignment.
*   Establish and operationalize local governance aligned to UNSW Sydney guiding principles and playbooks, including marketing policies, brand standards, approval workflows, and compliance controls, covering integrity of marketing claims, consent management, and data privacy, and partner compliance and management
*   Ensure all use of the UNSW brand in India complies with the Brand Licensing Agreement, including monitoring, reporting, and escalation of any misuse or risk.
*   Ensure compliance with Indian advertising standards, sector guidelines, and data protection requirements, maintaining audit-ready documentation.

  

**Marketing & Brand**

*   Lead integrated undergraduate and postgraduate campaign planning across paid, owned, shared, and earned channels, mapped across the full recruitment funnel.
*   Direct media planning and buying (search, social, video, display, OOH, portals) with clear objectives, benchmarks, brand safety controls, and compliance with UNSW procurement requirements.
*   Oversee digital marketing initiatives including SEM, social media, content marketing, email campaigns, SEO, and analytics.
*   Steward brand architecture and identity usage in India, including program naming conventions, co-branding, and protection against misuse, consistent with UNSW Sydney brand governance requirements.
*   Oversee content operations including editorial calendars, creative production, localisation, asset management, accessibility, and speed-to-market, ensuring brand safety and authenticity standards.
*   Coordinate local public relations activities in collaboration with UNSW Sydney Corporate Communications, M&DX teams, and retained agencies, including spokesperson preparation, media engagement, and crisis communications protocols.

  

**Recruitment, Outreach & Partnerships**

*   Lead future student outreach strategy and planning, including market mapping across schools, counsellors, pathway providers, industry bodies, and regional partners.
*   Manage partner governance, training, performance, and compliance with UNSW brand and regulatory requirements.
*   Represent UNSW Bengaluru at fairs, expos, school visits, open days, campus tours, webinars, and industry events, domestically and internationally.
*   Supervise enquiry management, lead nurturing, and conversion activities across the student journey.
*   Engage with regulators, industry partners, and community groups to strengthen institutional presence and reputation.

  

**Data, Performance & Reporting**

*   Track and manage recruitment pipelines using CRM and reporting tools across leads, applications, offers, acceptances, and commencements.
*   Partner with digital, CRM, and analytics teams to optimise conversion funnels and improve the student experience.
*   Provide regular dashboards, forecasts, ROI analysis, and strategic insights to senior leadership.
*   Evaluate campaign, channel, and partner performance and reallocate investment based on outcomes and risk.

  

**Leadership, Operations & Financial Management**

*   Lead the marketing and recruitment organisation structure spanning brand, content, digital, PR, outreach, events, analytics, and partnerships.
*   Recruit, onboard, mentor, and develop high-performing teams aligned to defined capability frameworks.
*   Foster a customer-focused, results-driven culture.
*   Own budget management, investment cases, and reallocation based on ROI and risk, aligning with budget stewardship and reporting standards applicable to UNSW Sydney.
*   Vendor management: RFPs, SOWs, SLAs, and performance reviews invoice reconciliation, and risk registers; in alignment with the UNSW Sydney M&DX Playbooks and with UNSW financial and delegation frameworks.
*   Collaborate cross-functionally with Academic Units, Admissions, Student Services, Facilities, Finance, Legal, and Compliance teams.

  

**Skills & Experience:**

  

**Qualifications**

*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field (required).
*   Master’s or postgraduate qualification in Marketing, Business, or Higher Education (preferred).

  

**Experience**

*   12+ years’ experience in senior marketing and/or student recruitment roles.
*   Demonstrated success delivering enrolment growth or sales targets in education or related sectors.
*   Experience leading multi-channel marketing, performance marketing, and student recruitment operations.
*   Proven capability working within global brand governance frameworks and matrixed organisations.

  

**Skills & Capabilities**

*   Strategic marketing and recruitment leadership with strong commercial and financial acumen.
*   Deep understanding of India’s higher education and youth market, recruitment channels, and partner ecosystems.
*   Data-driven decision-making with confidence managing and presenting complex insights to executive audiences.
*   Advanced leadership maturity and proven team performance management experience
*   Strong stakeholder engagement, influencing, and negotiation skills.
*   High cultural intelligence and ability to localise global strategy.
*   Exceptional written, verbal, and public communication skills.
*   Willingness and ability to travel across India and internationally as required.

  

**Key Relationships**

*   Chief Operating Officer, Rector, Academic Deans and Program Heads
*   Admissions, Student Services, and Professional Staff
*   UNSW Sydney Marketing & Digital Experience and Corporate Communications
*   Finance, Legal, and Compliance teams
*   Agency partners (media, PR, creative) and external vendors
*   Schools, counsellors, pathway partners, industry bodies, and regulators

  

Emeritus is committed to teaching the skills of the future by making high-quality education accessible and affordable to individuals, companies, and governments around the world. It does this by collaborating with more than 65 top-tier universities across the United States, Europe, Latin America, Southeast Asia, India and China. Emeritus’ short courses, degree programs, professional certificates, and senior executive programs help individuals learn new skills and transform their lives, companies and organizations. Its unique model of state-of-the-art technology, curriculum innovation, and hands-on instruction from senior faculty, mentors and coaches has educated more than 250,000 individuals across 80+ countries.

  

Founded in 2015, Emeritus, part of Eruditus Group, has more than 2,000 employees globally and offices in Mumbai, New Delhi, Shanghai, Singapore, Palo Alto, Mexico City, New York, Boston, London, and Dubai. Following its $650 million Series E funding round in August 2021, the Company is valued at $3.2 billion, and is backed by Accel, SoftBank Vision Fund 2, the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, Leeds Illuminate, Prosus Ventures, Sequoia Capital India, and Bertelsmann

  

_Emeritus provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws._

description:

**Office  
  
Join Thermo Fisher Scientific's Chromatography and Mass Spectrometry Division (CMD) as the Director of Regional Marketing for Asia Pacific and Japan (APJ). In this pivotal role, you'll shape the future of scientific innovation by defining and executing a cutting-edge, data-driven marketing strategy that propels revenue growth, expands market share, and deepens customer engagement across the diverse APJ region.  
  
As a key member of both the APJ commercial leadership team and the global division marketing leadership team, you'll:  
  

*   Spearhead AI-enabled, full-funnel marketing initiatives that align seamlessly with regional sales strategies and global business priorities
*   Collaborate with Global Business Units, Country Marketing leaders, and APJ commercial teams to drive impactful, localized marketing campaigns
*   Leverage advanced analytics, automation, and account-based strategies to build scalable demand engines and maximize marketing ROI
*   Lead a high-performing regional marketing team, fostering a culture of innovation, agility, and data-driven decision-making  
      
    

Your success will be measured by your ability to deliver measurable commercial impact through strategic leadership, flawless execution, and continuous optimization of marketing performance.  
  
**Key Responsibilities:  
  
**Regional Growth Strategy & Commercial Impact  
  

*   Develop and lead the APJ regional marketing strategy, aligning with CMD global priorities and APJ commercial objectives
*   Own regional marketing performance metrics, including pipeline contribution, revenue influence, and market share growth
*   Translate global strategies into data-backed, regionally relevant growth plans
*   Partner with Sales Leadership to align marketing programs with territory plans and key account priorities  
      
    

AI-Enabled Demand Generation & Omnichannel Execution  
  

*   Build a modern, full-funnel demand generation engine using AI, predictive analytics, and advanced segmentation
*   Orchestrate omnichannel programs across digital, search, social, events, and account-based marketing (ABM)
*   Drive adoption of AI-powered targeting, lead scoring, and personalization to improve conversion rates
*   Implement test-and-learn frameworks to continuously optimize performance and ROI  
      
    

Sales & Marketing Alignment  
  

*   Ensure rigorous alignment between marketing investment and sales strategy
*   Develop and execute annual commercial meetings aligned with strategic growth drivers
*   Establish clear SLAs and feedback loops between Marketing and Sales
*   Provide data-driven insights to inform commercial decisions  
      
    

Commercialization & Launch Excellence  
  

*   Lead regional commercialization strategies for new product introductions
*   Ensure effective launch readiness across channels and customer touchpoints
*   Localize messaging to reflect regional customer needs and competitive dynamics
*   Demonstrate agility in meeting evolving business needs  
      
    

Customer & Market Insights  
  

*   Drive Voice of Customer (VOC) initiatives to inform segmentation and value proposition refinement
*   Leverage CRM and analytics platforms to generate actionable insights
*   Monitor competitive landscape and translate insights into growth opportunities  
      
    

Team Leadership & Capability Building  
  

*   Mentor and develop a geographically distributed regional marketing team
*   Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and data-driven decision-making
*   Elevate digital, AI, and analytics capabilities across the organization
*   Champion best practice sharing across regions and with Global Marketing  
      
    

Budget & Operational Excellence  
  

*   Optimize the APJ regional marketing budget, ensuring disciplined investment allocation
*   Implement clear KPI dashboards and executive-level reporting
*   Drive operational rigor in campaign planning, execution, and measurement  
      
    

**REQUIREMENTS:  
  
**

*   Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Life Sciences, or related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred
*   12+ years of progressive marketing experience, with significant exposure to B2B, life sciences, scientific instrumentation, or technology-driven industries
*   Proven success leading regional marketing in APJ or similarly complex, multi-country environments
*   Demonstrated ability to build and scale demand generation programs with measurable pipeline and revenue impact
*   Experience leading teams in matrixed, global organizations
*   Proficiency in marketing technology platforms and data analytics tools
*   Strong strategic problem-solving and communication skills
*   Ability to travel 30-40% within the APJ region
*   Fluency in English; proficiency in one or more APJ languages highly valued  
      
    

At Thermo Fisher Scientific, you'll find meaningful work that makes a positive global impact. Join us in our mission to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.

The role acts as the single point of contact for supported Sales Centers and ensures full alignment with Endress+Hauser global strategy and standards.

Market Development & Business Growth  
  

*   Define and communicate a clear market vision and strategy for India and South/East Asia with strong customer and market orientation.
*   Define, execute, and follow up market development plans together with local Sales Centers.
